NIS2 Compliance Services

Expert NIS2 Directive compliance and cybersecurity governance

Expert NIS2 Directive compliance services including assessments, CISO as a Service, and gap analysis for essential and important entities across the EU.
  1. Home
  2. Services
  3. NIS2 Compliance

NIS2 Compliance

Navigate the NIS2 Directive with confidence and ensure robust cybersecurity governance

Expert NIS2 Directive Compliance Services

The NIS2 Directive represents a significant evolution in European cybersecurity regulation, introducing stringent requirements for essential and important entities. Our comprehensive services help you navigate compliance, strengthen your security posture, and maintain continuous regulatory alignment.

NIS2 Assessments

Comprehensive evaluation of your organization’s compliance status against NIS2 requirements.

What’s Included:

  • Regulatory scope determination
  • Risk management framework assessment
  • Security controls evaluation
  • Supply chain security review
  • Incident reporting capability assessment
  • Compliance roadmap development

Learn More

CISO as a Service

Virtual Chief Information Security Officer services tailored for NIS2 compliance.

What’s Included:

  • Strategic cybersecurity leadership
  • NIS2 compliance program management
  • Board and executive reporting
  • Security policy development
  • Incident response coordination
  • Vendor and third-party risk management

Learn More

Gap Assessments

Identify and prioritize gaps between your current security posture and NIS2 requirements.

What’s Included:

  • Current state documentation
  • Gap identification and analysis
  • Risk-based prioritization
  • Remediation recommendations
  • Implementation roadmap
  • Cost-benefit analysis

Learn More

Understanding NIS2 Compliance

The Network and Information Security Directive 2 (NIS2) establishes baseline cybersecurity requirements for entities operating in critical sectors. Our assessment services provide a comprehensive evaluation of your compliance status.

Scoping Analysis

Determine if your organization falls under NIS2 directive requirements

Controls Assessment

Evaluate implementation of required security measures

Gap Identification

Identify non-conformities and areas requiring improvement

Compliance Roadmap

Develop actionable plan to achieve and maintain compliance

Key NIS2 Requirements We Address

Technical Measures

  • Risk analysis and information system security policies
  • Incident handling and business continuity management
  • Supply chain security and supplier relationships
  • Security in network and information systems acquisition
  • Policies on cryptography and encryption
  • Human resources security and access control
  • Asset management and multi-factor authentication

Organizational Measures

  • Governance framework and security policies
  • Incident notification procedures (24-hour reporting)
  • Management body accountability and oversight
  • Security awareness training programs
  • Security testing and vulnerability assessments
  • Crisis management procedures
  • Third-party risk management

Virtual CISO Services for NIS2

Our CISO as a Service offering provides strategic cybersecurity leadership specifically designed to help organizations achieve and maintain NIS2 compliance without the cost of a full-time executive.

Strategic Governance

Establish and maintain NIS2-compliant governance structures, policies, and procedures aligned with your business objectives.

Executive Reporting

Regular board-level reporting on cybersecurity posture, compliance status, and risk exposure as required by NIS2.

Incident Management

Lead incident response activities and ensure compliance with NIS2 24-hour reporting requirements to authorities.

Policy Development

Create and maintain comprehensive security policies and procedures that meet NIS2 technical and organizational requirements.

Risk Management

Implement and oversee risk management frameworks compliant with NIS2 requirements and industry best practices.

Vendor Management

Oversee third-party risk management and ensure supply chain security as mandated by NIS2.

CISO Service Engagement Models

We offer flexible engagement models to suit your organization’s needs:

  • Retainer Model: Fixed monthly hours for ongoing strategic guidance and compliance oversight
  • Project-Based: Focused engagements for specific compliance initiatives or assessments
  • Hybrid Model: Combination of retainer and project work for comprehensive coverage

Comprehensive Gap Assessments

Our gap assessment service provides a detailed analysis of the delta between your current security posture and NIS2 requirements, delivering actionable recommendations for achieving compliance.

Phase 1: Current State Analysis

Duration: 1-2 weeks

  • Documentation review (policies, procedures, technical controls)
  • Stakeholder interviews (IT, security, legal, management)
  • Technical controls assessment
  • Process and procedure evaluation

Phase 2: Gap Identification

Duration: 1 week

  • Map current controls to NIS2 requirements
  • Identify compliance gaps and deficiencies
  • Document non-conformities with evidence
  • Assess gap severity and impact

Phase 3: Risk Prioritization

Duration: 1 week

  • Risk-based gap prioritization
  • Impact analysis (regulatory, operational, reputational)
  • Effort and cost estimation
  • Quick win identification

Phase 4: Remediation Planning

Duration: 1-2 weeks

  • Detailed remediation recommendations
  • Phased implementation roadmap
  • Resource requirements (people, tools, budget)
  • Success metrics and KPIs

Phase 5: Report Delivery & Presentation

Duration: 1 week

  • Comprehensive gap assessment report
  • Executive summary for board presentation
  • Technical appendices with detailed findings
  • Stakeholder presentation and Q&A

Why Choose Our NIS2 Services

Our Expertise

  • NIS2 Specialists: Deep expertise in EU cybersecurity regulations and compliance frameworks
  • Multi-Sector Experience: Proven track record across essential and important entities in various sectors
  • Technical & Legal Knowledge: Combination of cybersecurity expertise and regulatory compliance understanding
  • Practical Approach: Focus on pragmatic, business-aligned compliance solutions
  • Continuous Updates: Stay current with evolving NIS2 guidance and national implementations

Our Approach

  • Risk-Based: Prioritize efforts based on actual risk exposure and regulatory requirements
  • Business-Aligned: Ensure compliance measures support, not hinder, business objectives
  • Cost-Effective: Optimize resource allocation and avoid over-engineering solutions
  • Collaborative: Work closely with your teams to build internal capabilities
  • Sustainable: Design compliance programs that are maintainable long-term

Who Needs NIS2 Compliance?

NIS2 applies to entities across multiple sectors. Your organization may be covered if you operate in:

Essential Entities (High Critical)

  • Energy (electricity, oil, gas, hydrogen)
  • Transport (air, rail, water, road)
  • Banking and financial market infrastructures
  • Health sector
  • Drinking water and wastewater
  • Digital infrastructure
  • Public administration
  • Space

Important Entities (Other Critical)

  • Postal and courier services
  • Waste management
  • Chemicals production and distribution
  • Food production and distribution
  • Manufacturing (medical devices, electronics, machinery, vehicles)
  • Digital providers (cloud, data centers, CDNs, DNS, marketplaces, search engines)
  • Research organizations
